title: The King on Main Street
writer: Gaston Arman de Caillavet, Emmanuel Arène, Monta Bell
actors: Adolphe Menjou, Bessie Love, Greta Nissen
plot: King Serge IV of Molvania (Menjou) comes to Manhattan to conduct business with Arthur Trent (Kilgour), but instead goes to Coney Island, where he meets Gladys Humphreys (Love) and John Rockland (Shaw). John, not knowing the king's...
